IMU._comment: accel_q_gyro and gyro_q_mag is in JPL(qx,qy,qz,qw).

imu_intrinsics._comment: gyro_calib_mat and accl_calib_mat are 3x3 matrices saved in row-major order

display._comment: target_type includes 1)IMU, 2)slam camera, 3)world camera; target_q_left_display and target_q_right_display is in hamilton(qx,qy,qz,qw).

display_distortion._comment: type: 0 means invalid, 1 represents display distortion method.
